summary: Comprehensive testing of Resend email integration, Stripe subscription payments with discount codes and crypto option, and invoice generation with UK VAT. Fixed 2 critical bugs during testing. All 19 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing shows all features working correctly.

fixed_during_testing.issue: KeyError: 'discount_percentage' - checkout endpoint used wrong field name for discount
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed discount['discount_percentage'] to discount['discount_percent'] on line 2495

fixed_during_testing.issue: Unhandled exception when session_id is invalid - caused 520 server error
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added try/except block to handle invalid session IDs gracefully with 404 response

fixed_during_testing.issue: Frontend sent JSON body but backend expected query params; also response format mismatch
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed endpoint to accept JSON body via Pydantic model and return nested 'discount' object with 'discount_percentage' field

passed_tests: GET /api/subscriptions/plans - Returns monthly (€15) and annual (€144) plans
POST /api/support/contact - Contact form submission with Resend email
Contact form validation (required fields, email format)
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout - Monthly plan with VAT calculation
Frontend: Pricing page with plan selection, user count, discount code, crypto toggle
Frontend: Settings page with Billing & Invoices tab
Frontend: Support page with Contact form (Resend integration)
Frontend: Subscription Success page with payment status states
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentTransaction model is defined twice (lines 263 and 389) - should consolidate
stripe_webhook function is defined twice (lines 1627 and 2659) - should consolidate
Bare except clauses used in several places - should catch specific exceptions
Resend email is in TEST MODE - only sends to verified email (florian@unyted.world)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed discount_percentage bug, added error handling for invalid sessions, fixed discount-codes/validate endpoint)
seed_data_creation: Test discount codes created during testing with TEST prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription/payment features implemented and working: 1) GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns monthly (€15) and annual (€144) plans, 2) POST /api/subscriptions/checkout creates Stripe checkout session with discount codes and crypto option, 3) GET /api/subscriptions/status/{session_id} checks payment status, 4) Invoice endpoints working, 5) Support contact form sends emails via Resend (TEST MODE - only to florian@unyted.world). UK VAT at 20% applied to all invoices.

mocked_apis.resend_email: Resend is in TEST MODE - only sends to verified email (florian@unyted.world). Production mode requires domain verification.

features_verified.subscription_plans_endpoint: ✓ Working - returns monthly and annual plans with correct pricing
features_verified.subscription_checkout: ✓ Working - creates Stripe checkout session with VAT calculation
features_verified.discount_codes: ✓ Working - validation and application in checkout
features_verified.crypto_payment_option: ✓ Working - 5% discount applied, currency converted to USD
features_verified.payment_status_polling: ✓ Working - handles valid and invalid sessions
features_verified.invoices_endpoint: ✓ Working - returns user invoices with VAT details
features_verified.support_contact_form: ✓ Working - sends email via Resend (TEST MODE)
features_verified.pricing_page_ui: ✓ Working - plan selection, user count, discount code, crypto toggle
features_verified.settings_billing_tab: ✓ Working - shows subscription status and invoices
features_verified.subscription_success_page: ✓ Working - shows payment status with polling

discount_percentage_keyerror.description: Checkout endpoint failed with KeyError when discount code was applied
discount_percentage_keyerror.root_cause: Code used discount['discount_percentage'] but database stores discount_percent

invalid_session_500_error.description: Payment status endpoint returned 500/520 for invalid session IDs
invalid_session_500_error.root_cause: No error handling for Stripe API exceptions
invalid_session_500_error.fix: Added try/except to return 404 for invalid sessions

discount_validate_format_mismatch.root_cause: Backend expected query params but frontend sent JSON body; response format also mismatched
discount_validate_format_mismatch.fix: Changed endpoint to accept JSON body and return format expected by frontend
